runtime_korean_guard.goal: Fix runtime Korean string corruption and fail verification when suspicious runtime strings appear again.
acceptance: runtime Korean strings render correctly in compact manager labels
broken runtime Korean literals fail automated verification

remote_restart_rollback.goal: If upload succeeded but restart or later verification fails, remote files must be restored before the next attempt.
acceptance: restart failure triggers remote restore before the next attempt
browser verification failure still restores remote state
final failure does not leave partial remote changes behind

checklist_manual_override.goal: Protect manual checklist edits from later auto-fill overwrites and provide a reset path.
acceptance: manual checklist edits are not overwritten by later auto-fill while override is enabled
there is a clear path to reset override back to automatic mode

success_feedback_verification.goal: Strengthen non-blocking success feedback tasks so blocking dialogs cannot false-pass verification.
acceptance: success feedback tasks set forbidDialogs true
verification contains at least one real assertion beyond screenshot

location_picker.goal: Improve the location picker UX within the existing structure.
